narrative:
Jacksonville (precinct in Athens County) has 287 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 10.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 39.0%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 28.9 percentage points.
